HighlyAvailableVirtualIpBindingEip.haVipId: The ID of the highly available virtual IP
HighlyAvailableVirtualIpBindingEip.clientToken: Idempotency token, an ASCII string of up to 64 characters. See [ClientToken Idempotency Support](VPC/API参考/通用说明.md#幂等性)
HighlyAvailableVirtualIpBindingEip.publicIpAddress: The address of the Elastic IP
